name: growthlens
description: AI-agent skills for marketers, growth & business analysts — competitor teardowns, funnel audits, pricing analysis, and more.

plugins.name: growthlens
plugins.description: 15 business-analysis skills your AI agent can apply to any URL: competitor teardown, business-model & offer teardown, funnel audit, landing UX review, pricing & positioning analysis, ad-creative analysis, ICP segmentation, SEO content-gap, review mining, email-nurture teardown, webinar-funnel teardown, social-proof audit, and an online-school audit.
